name: small law firm administrators processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For small law firm administrators processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual billing causes cash flow gaps. We automate billing summaries instead of manual billing and spreadsheet tracking.
target_audience: small law firm administrators processing 5–15 invoices/month
problem_solved: Manual billing processes lead to errors and delays.
